SELECT punycodeEncode(value) AS punycode_value FROM test_strings WHERE value LIKE '%ü%';
SELECT value, punycodeEncode(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings) AS subquery;
SELECT DISTINCT punycodeEncode(subquery.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT a.value, punycodeEncode(a.value) FROM test_strings AS a JOIN additional_strings AS b ON a.value LIKE CONCAT('%', b.value, '%');
SELECT punycodeEncode(CONCAT(a.value, ' ', b.value)) FROM test_strings AS a CROSS JOIN additional_strings AS b;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT punycodeEncode(value) FROM test_strings) AS encoded_values WHERE encoded_values IS NOT NULL;
